title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Oberoi Realty

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Oberoi Realty
jsonLd.description:
Oberoi Realty has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Rajkot office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Oberoi Realty:
Oberoi Realty is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oberoi Realty!
